title: Modern Industrialization Sound Addon
description: Addon for MI that adds sounds to the wrench and all the machines in the mod
body:
# Modern Industrialization Sound Addon

This mod is an addon that adds sounds to all the singleblock and multiblock machines in Modern Industrialization. It also adds noises to the wrench uses! This mod must be installed on both the client and the server in order to work.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/skFM2xJ35kw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
 
The mod also features a Steel Mallet that can be used to silence & unsilence your machines by right-clicking them. Here's its recipe:

![mallet recipe](https://i.imgur.com/zheklp5.png)
 
## Requirements

Modern Industrialization >= 1.6.14 (and all it's dependencies)

I will be porting this to MI's 1.20 branch in the future.

 
## Optional

KubeJS >= 1902.6.1-build.300

 
## For Modpack Creators

If you've added any custom machines into MI using the KubeJS compatibility, you can add sounds for those easily following [this guide](https://github.com/TheStaticVoid/MI-Sound-Addon/wiki/Adding-sounds).

## Issues
If you experience any issues with this mod, or have any questions, please join the [StaTech Industry discord](https://discord.gg/RDaJEnN3uS) and ask there.

 
## Credits & License Notices

The majority of the sounds for this mod are from the [GregTech CEu Modern Project](https://github.com/GregTechCEu/GregTech-Modern). The sounds for this project are licensed under the Creative Commons license. For full disclaimer of licenses, check the [README](https://github.com/TheStaticVoid/MI-Sound-Addon/blob/master/README.md).

 

This mod is not affiliated with the Modern Industrialization mod and it's development team. Please do not go to them if you have any issues.
